description: Guests search available listings by location, date range, and price. Location search uses geographic distance — the query address is geocoded to coordinates and listings within a specified radius (default 50 km) are returned. Results are paginated and exclude listings with conflicting bookings.
functional_requirements: As a guest, I can search available listings by location (address string geocoded to lat/lng), date range, and optional price range; listings with conflicting bookings for the requested dates are excluded
Location search finds listings within a configurable radius (default 50 km) of the searched coordinates using PostGIS spatial distance query
Search results are paginated with a configurable page size
non_functional_requirements: Search endpoint is publicly accessible (no authentication required)
Results are paginated; default page size is 20
Geographic distance filtering uses PostGIS ST_Distance or hibernate-spatial; coordinates stored as Point geometry
